scripts.dev: bash scripts/ensure-docker.sh && dotnet build && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --prefix-colors "yellow.bold,cyan.bold,green.bold,magenta.bold" --names "AUTH   ,CLIENTES,TRANSAC ,FRONTEND" "dotnet run --no-build --project src/TechfinChallenge.Auth.Api" "dotnet run --no-build --project src/TechfinChallenge.Clientes.Api" "dotnet run --no-build --project src/TechfinChallenge.Transacao.Api" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.dev:back: bash scripts/ensure-docker.sh && dotnet build && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --prefix-colors "yellow.bold,cyan.bold,green.bold" --names "AUTH   ,CLIENTES,TRANSAC" "dotnet run --no-build --project src/TechfinChallenge.Auth.Api" "dotnet run --no-build --project src/TechfinChallenge.Clientes.Api" "dotnet run --no-build --project src/TechfinChallenge.Transacao.Api"
